role_summary: the forensic accountant investigates financial irregularities, frauds, and disputes by  analyzing financial records and evidence.
responsibilities: • analyze financial data to detect fraud and irregulariti es  • conduct forensic accounting investigations   • examine transactions, books, and supporting documents   • prepare forensic reports and documentation   • support legal proceedings and regulatory investigations   • coordinate with legal teams and enforcement agencies
qualifications: • qualified chartered accountant   • strong forensic accounting and analytical skills   • attention to detail and investigative mindset
